## Summary

- What problem does this PR solve?
- What changed?

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new feature)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] ci/chore

## Testing

- [ ] `docker compose exec app php artisan test`
- [ ] `docker compose exec node npm run build`
- [ ] Manual test completed (if UI/behavior changes)

## Screenshots / recordings

Attach before/after screenshots for UI changes.

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets committed (`.env`, keys, tokens)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior/setup changed
- [ ] CI checks pass
